articles.title: So you want a job in the fly-fishing industry? With Kirk Deeter
articles.summary: I get regular questions from people about getting a job in the fly-fishing industry, both in the podcast mailbox and in person at shows and store visits. It's a tough question and I don't have all the answers so I called upon my buddy Kirk Deeter...

articles.title: Podcast: Trout, Tarpon, and Other Critters in Costa Rica, with Kevin Jackson
